hooks.prompt:
This project uses tndm for ticket coordination (git-aware ticket system for AI agents in a monorepo). Review what was accomplished in this session: $ARGUMENTS

If work was started, progressed, or completed that corresponds to a tndm ticket, and the ticket status has not been updated to reflect this, include the appropriate update command in your reason: `tndm ticket update <ID> --status <new_status>`. Only suggest this if it is clearly relevant to the work done. Do not suggest ticket updates for conversational or exploratory sessions.

Respond with JSON: {"ok": true} to allow stopping, or {"ok": false, "reason": "your explanation with ticket update command"} to continue working.
